title: STX Stock Tickeron detected bullish Stock Pattern: Broadening Wedge Ascending STX, netting in a 6.71% gain over 1 week
author: tickeron_community
selftext: On August 26, 2025, A.I.dvisor detected a Broadening Wedge Ascending Pattern (Bullish) for [Seagate Technology Holdings PLC](https://tickeron.com/ticker/STX/) ([STX](https://tickeron.com/ticker/STX/), $165.24). On August 26, 2025, A.I.dvisor confirmed the Bullish pattern, setting a target price of $183.89. 8 days later, on September 03, 2025, [STX](https://tickeron.com/ticker/STX/) reached the target price resulting in a +6.71% for traders who took a long position in the stock.
